---
title: Aruba EdgeConnect Enterprise
pcx_content_type: integration-guide
description: Connect Aruba EdgeConnect to Cloudflare WAN.
products:
  - cloudflare-wan
---

import { Render } from "~/components";

<Render
	file="cloudflare-wan/third-party/aruba-edgeconnect"
	product="networking-services"
	params={{
		tunnelHealthCheckUrl: "/cloudflare-wan/reference/tunnel-health-checks/",
		magicFirewallUrl: "/cloudflare-network-firewall/",
		gatewayUrl: "/cloudflare-one/traffic-policies/",
	}}
/>
